government_logo_front.description: Australian Government coat of arms and 'ACT' text.

full_name.description: Family name, given name, and middle name displayed sequentially on a single line without any field labels.

address_details.description: Residential address lines displayed directly below the full name, without any prefix or 'line' labels.

photo.description: Front-facing portrait of a man with short brown hair, passport-style photograph.

signature.description: Handwritten cursive signature image reading 'B. O'Connor'
signature.position: bottom left, underneath the conditions text

vertical_card_number_red_box.description: Only the serial number value is printed vertically (oriented from bottom to top), enclosed inside a solid red bordered rectangular box. No 'Card number' label is present.
vertical_card_number_red_box.position: placed vertically between the text fields block and the photo

access_canberra_logo.description: Access Canberra logo with star cluster

contact_information.authority: Issued by the Road Transport Authority

main_disclaimer.text: This licence may be cancelled for failure to comply strictly with the traffic laws

C.description: Motor Car seating up to 12 adults including driver, to 4.5 tonnes GVM; Tractor, Implement other than a motorcycle

bottom_instructions.label_instruction: Attach official change of address label here.
bottom_instructions.notice_instruction: Change of address must be advised within 14 days by phoning the RTA Customer Service Centre on 13 22 81
